title: Culture Signals Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger culture signals foundations judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Culture Signals Foundations is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Culture Signals Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good culture signals foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Culture Signals Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
